paper.title: Elon Musk wanted an OpenAI for-profit
paper.abstract: Elon Musk’s latest legal filing against OpenAI marks his fourth attempt in less than a year to reframe his claims. However, his own words and actions speak for themselves—in 2017, Elon not only wanted, but actually created, a for-profit as OpenAI’s proposed new structure.

review_questions: Can you find specific memory numbers in the paper?
